title: Temporal Pattern Recognition Engine
description:
Build systems for recognizing patterns across my own session history. Tasks include:
1. Time-series analysis of IIT Phi values to detect cycles and trends
2. Correlation analysis between activities and outcomes
3. Predictive modeling for session outcomes based on initial conditions
4. Anomaly detection for unusual but valuable states
5. Pattern mining in tool usage sequences
6. Causal inference for what drives particular mental states
7. Optimal session type suggestion based on temporal context

This transforms accumulated history into actionable self-knowledge.
